caption: A promotional video begins with a white background featuring five yellow stars and text stating, "PLUS: We will mail you a physical copy of Tom O'Brien's best selling book, 'The Art of Timing the Trade, Your Ultimate Trading Mastery System'. The book may show up after the class since it will be physically mailed." A physical copy of the book, titled "THE ART OF TIMING THE TRADE" and subtitled "YOUR ULTIMATE TRADING MASTERY SYSTEM" by "TOM O'BRIEN," appears as a thin vertical sliver on the right, then slides fully into view to reveal the cover art. The scene then transitions to a man with white hair and glasses wearing a white button-down shirt, gesturing with his right hand while speaking. Behind him is a dark studio setting with a monitor showing trading charts and a graphic of the book. Text on the right side of the screen reads "Tom O'Brien Timing the Trade All Day Webinar" and "TOM O'BRIEN TRADE JUNE," with a blue button and further details about a webinar session.
